subcodes.first_line: O fragrant breath from the gardens of certitude! The time of effulgence and resurrection hath come, and the hour of the passing and wafting of the favors of the Glorious Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نفحه ریاض ایقان هنگام سطوع و نشور است و وقت مرور و هبوب عنایت رب جلیل
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the concourse on high, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration
